prompt: /update-project --project test-project --session-summary "Ran sensitivity analysis with 5 model variants today. All showed 1-3% accuracy — the sqrt-prop global architecture is broken at all tested hyperparameter settings. Best variant: learning rate 1e-4, hidden dim 256, gave 3.1% accuracy. This is a dead end."

assertions.text: results-log.md contains new entry with numerical values (1-3% accuracy, 3.1%, lr=1e-4)
Results entry includes interpretation that this architecture is not viable
project-dashboard.md status line updated to reflect sensitivity analysis outcome
decisions-log.md not modified with a spurious entry
